dialogue_line_replacements.text: Sí, es una de las colecciones más impresionantes que he visto en mi vida. Como el Prado, pero diferente.
dialogue_line_replacements.translation: Yes, it's one of the most impressive collections I've ever seen. Like the Prado, but different.

dialogue_line_replacements.text: Además de las artes visuales, la música española tiene una riqueza impresionante — el flamenco, la zarzuela, el pop español.
dialogue_line_replacements.translation: Beyond the visual arts, Spanish music has impressive richness — flamenco, zarzuela, Spanish pop.

cultural_notes_overrides.formality: Spain has an extraordinary artistic heritage: the Prado Museum (Velázquez, Goya, El Greco), Guggenheim Bilbao, flamenco (UNESCO heritage), Gaudí's architecture in Barcelona, and a rich literary tradition from Cervantes to García Lorca.
cultural_notes_overrides.regional_variations: Spain has strong regional artistic identities: Catalan modernisme (Gaudí), Basque sculpture (Chillida), Andalusian flamenco, Galician bagpipe music. Respecting regional diversity is essential when discussing Spanish culture.
